positive: A minimalist, elegant forest scene composition. A single, stylized woodland creature (like a fox or a deer) is depicted in a serene, confident pose, standing among stylized, geometric flora and ethereal, flowing branches. The design uses a high-contrast limited color palette of deep indigo, sage green, and burnt orange, rendered in a detailed, etching-style ink wash illustration. The composition should be centered, allowing for clear visibility when printed on fabric. Use strong, clean silhouettes and delicate linework. Artistic style: Nordic folklore meets modern botanical sketch. Isolated subject, perfect for apparel printing, vector-like quality.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, excessive noise, bad anatomy, mutation, extra limbs, cartoon, photorealistic, solid background, cluttered, messy
